programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: On a full moon, a stranger sets up an erotic photo shoot on a neighbor's porch; two Floridian landscapers are shocked when a woman begins hurling insults; a tenant becomes incensed by his landlord's unannounced visits and decides to lock her out.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A New Orleans man trims branches off his neighbors' hedge so he can park his car in the street, sparking their fury; neighbors in California take exception to workers climbing over their fence to fix a blocked sewer pipe.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A woman films a shocking altercation between her neighbors in their apartment building parking lot, which ends in some truly dangerous driving; the story of a nurse who saved her neighbor's life.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A newly-married couple face a hostile neighborhood when building a tiny home in Missouri out of shipping containers; brawling neighbors in a New York bodega leaves one with a broken jaw; in Alabama, a man claims the neighbors stole his dog.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A next-door neighbor vandalizes a woman's car; a nanny nabs a porch pirate trying to purloin a package; a good Samaritan tries to rescue a neighbor who is left hanging from the roof; a food delivery man deals with a customer's nasty neighbor.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Accusations fly in a California neighborhood when pickleball equipment goes missing; neighbors in New York City throw eggs at a man for his extreme views; a homeowner wades through his options as his apartment slowly fills with water.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: When a skateboarder dodges a young child playing in a Louisiana skate park, he takes out his frustrations on the kid's parents; a neighborhood firework display causes sparks to fly between two neighbors in Orlando.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Portland, Oregon, a man standing in his own driveway is questioned by a neighbor about why he's there; in South Carolina's Blue Ridge Mountains, a tense balcony dispute escalates when a husband steps in to defend his family; and in Michigan, a mother who feels constantly watched decides to fight back, drawing plenty of attention.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A man tries to solve a long-running property line dispute by destroying his neighbor's building; a whole neighborhood runs for cover when a fireworks celebration goes bad; a father finds a new way to lay down the law on his daughter's date.
